MELItem.Title: Mix Manifold Temperature Sensors (787-10: VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A875, VN-A876, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided both pack outlet temperature sensor systems operate normally.

ListItem.Para: If cabin temperatures become warmer than desired, consider one or more of the following temporary actions:
Lower the selected cabin temperature on the P5 overhead panel temperature selector in the flight deck.
Select IFE system modes designed to reduce cabin heat loads.

Note.Para: Availability of modes dependent on IFE system installed and airline modifiable options.

ListItem.Para: Set IFE OFF using the IFE Power switch on the Video Control Station.
Select HEAT REDUCTION mode using the Cabin Attendant Panel TEMPERATURE menu (adjusts cabin lighting and window shading).
